Precondition: User is authenticated, 'Kudos' cards and sidebar are visible
Test_Data: Kudos card showing sender avatar/receiver name; Sidebar displaying Sunner avatar/name
Steps: 1. Locate the avatar or name (B.3.2/B.3.5/D.3.2) in the Kudos card or sidebar. 2. Click the selected avatar or name.
Expected_Result: 1. --- 2. The profile page opens for the selected person.

Precondition: User is authenticated, Highlight/All Kudos/Spotlight section is visible
Test_Data: Kudos card in Highlight section with 'View Details' button; Kudos content in All Kudos; Recipient node in Spotlight board
Steps: 1. Locate a Kudos card or node in the Highlight, All Kudos, or Spotlight section. 2. Click the 'View Details' button, Kudos content, or recipient node.
Expected_Result: 1. --- 2. The Kudos detail page opens for the selected Kudos.

Precondition: User is unauthenticated but can view Kudos UI
Test_Data: Attempt to click sender/receiver avatar or name on any Kudos post/leaderboard; Attempt to click 'View Details' or content
Steps: 1. While signed out, attempt to open any profile or details from the Kudos UI.
Expected_Result: 1. The system redirects to the login page or displays an authentication prompt (NOTE: whole app is already auth-gated via middleware except /login and /auth/* — this should already hold; verify no regression)

Steps: 1. Observe the banner at the top of the page. 2. Check logo and title display. 3. Attempt to click or hover on the banner area.
Expected_Result: 1. Banner KV Kudos is visible and positioned at the top. 2. Logo 'SAA 2025 KUDOS' and the title 'Hệ thống ghi nhận lời cảm ơn' are displayed correctly. 3. Banner is not interactive (readonly).

Steps: 1. Locate the A.1/Ô nhập/Ghi nhận form below the banner. 2. Observe its shape. 3. Verify left pencil icon present. 4. Check nothing overlaps field.
Expected_Result: 1. Input field is visible, pill shape. 2. Left pencil icon shown. 3. Field is neither overlapped nor obscured.

Steps: 1. Locate header/filters/carousel. 2. Check alignment/spacing.
Expected_Result: 1. Header ('Sun* Annual Awards 2025') + subtitle ('HIGHLIGHT KUDOS') shown. 2. Hashtag (B.1.1) and Phòng ban (B.1.2) filters visible, aligned. 3. Carousel visible, spaced, items don't overlap.

Page_Name: Tiêu đề HIGHLIGHT KUDOS với bộ lọc
Test_Data: Hashtag (B.1.1) and Phòng ban (B.1.2) filter buttons
Steps: 1. Confirm visibility/position/alignment of filter buttons. 2. Check active/inactive state switches.
Expected_Result: 1. Buttons visible and aligned. 2. Visual states switch correctly between active/inactive.

Steps: 1. Locate B.1.1 button. 2. Verify visibility/position. 3. Confirm not overlapped.
Expected_Result: 1. 'Hashtag' filter button displayed and positioned correctly. 2. Not overlapped/obscured.

Steps: 1. Locate B.1.2 button. 2. Verify visibility/position. 3. Confirm not overlapped.
Expected_Result: 1. 'Phòng ban' filter button displayed and positioned correctly. 2. Not overlapped/obscured.

Steps: 1. Check total slides (should be 5). 2. Observe Prev/Next arrows. 3. Check enabled/disabled at ends. 4. Check active card prominence.
Expected_Result: 1. Top 5 Kudos cards displayed. 2. Prev/Next arrows visible, disabled on 1st/last slide respectively. 3. Active card prominent/centered; inactive cards faded/non-interactive.

Steps: 1. Examine card fields: sender/receiver info, time label, hashtags, action buttons. 2. Verify presence of all fields.
Expected_Result: 1. Sender/receiver info displayed. 2. Time, message, hashtags visible. 3. Like (heart) and copy link buttons present.

Steps: 1. Locate B.7.3 search bar. 2. Verify present. 3. Check search icon. 4. Check placeholder text.
Expected_Result: 1. Search bar visible. 2. Search icon shown. 3. Placeholder 'Tìm kiếm' displayed correctly.

Steps: 1. Check word cloud with recipient names. 2. Look for total count label (B.7.1/388 KUDOS). 3. Check pan/zoom + search controls. 4. Observe loading/empty states.
Expected_Result: 1. Word cloud with recipient names displayed. 2. Total count label visible. 3. Pan/zoom + search controls present. 4. Proper loading/empty states shown.

Precondition: Main page loaded with Kudos feed
Steps: 1. Locate Kudos list + sidebar. 2. Inspect card alignment + sidebar visibility. 3. Check pagination/infinite scroll. 4. Observe empty feed state.
Expected_Result: 1. Kudos cards aligned, sidebar visible. 2. Pagination/infinite scroll working. 3. Empty state shows 'Hiện tại chưa có Kudos nào.'

Page_Name: Thẻ KUDO hiển thị bài cảm ơn
Steps: 1. Check sender/receiver info, gallery, hashtags, like/copy link buttons. 2. Attempt clicking/hovering non-interactive icons/labels.
Expected_Result: 1. All fields/gallery/hashtags/action buttons visible and placed correctly. 2. Non-interactive icons/labels unresponsive.

Steps: 1. Check sidebar visibility/alignment. 2. Verify section headers, data labels, separators, leaderboard arrangement.
Expected_Result: 1. Sidebar visible, separated from Kudos feed. 2. Headers/labels/separators shown, leaderboard properly arranged.

Steps: 1. Observe A.1 input field on page load.
Expected_Result: 1. Input field displays placeholder 'Hôm nay
Specs: bạn muốn gửi lời cảm ơn và ghi nhận đến ai?'.

Steps: 1. Inspect B.7.3 search bar on page load.
Expected_Result: 1. Search bar displays placeholder 'Tìm kiếm'.

Steps: 1. Leave A.1 input field empty. 2. Try to submit the form.
Expected_Result: 1. --- 2. Submission blocked; submit button disabled.

Steps: 1. Input 100-char string, trigger search. 2. Input 101-char string, trigger search. 3. Leave empty, attempt search.
Expected_Result: 1. 100 chars accepted, search works. 2. 101 chars rejected, error shown. 3. Empty search blocked, required message displayed.

Test_Data: Valid kudos message, e.g. 'Thank you for your support!'
Steps: 1. Enter valid kudos message in A.1 input field. 2. Submit the form.
Expected_Result: 1. --- 2. Kudos saved to database; new entry appears in Kudos feed.

Sub_Sub_Category: Show 'Hiện tại chưa có Kudos nào.'
Steps: 1. Access Kudos feed/card list when no Kudos exist.
Expected_Result: 1. System displays 'Hiện tại chưa có Kudos nào.'.

Steps: 1. Open leaderboard when no data present.
Expected_Result: 1. System displays 'Chưa có dữ liệu'.

Precondition: User is viewing Kudos they sent
Steps: 1. Attempt to click Like (C.4.1/Hearts) button on your own sent Kudos.
Expected_Result: 1. Like button disabled for sender; cannot like own Kudos.

Sub_Sub_Category: One like per user per Kudos
Precondition: User has not liked a Kudos yet
Steps: 1. Attempt to click Like button multiple times on a single Kudos card.
Expected_Result: 1. Each user may like a Kudos only once; multiple likes blocked (idempotent toggle).

Precondition: Kudos post eligible for special day (admin configured)
Steps: 1. Click Like (heart) button on a Kudos entry sent during a special day.
Expected_Result: 1. DEFERRED per clarification: special-day 2x bonus is OUT OF SCOPE this pass (backlog item) — implement standard +1 heart only, no special_days config table this pass.

Steps: 1. Click D.1.8/Nút 'Mở quà' on sidebar.
Expected_Result: 1. MOCK ONLY per user instruction: Secret Box feature not built. Button may show a simple 'coming soon' placeholder — do not build real Secret Box dialog/logic.

Steps: 1. Open Spotlight while loading. 2. Open when no data. 3. Open when recipient nodes exist.
Expected_Result: 1. Loading indicator shown. 2. Empty state message if no entries. 3. Recipient nodes displayed, interactive as normal.

Precondition: Hashtags available, user on Kudos screen
Test_Data: Hashtags sourced live from DB, e.g. ['IDOL GIỚI TRẺ', others]
Steps: 1. Click B.1.1 to open dropdown. 2. Select a hashtag to filter. 3. Clear filter to show all.
Expected_Result: 1. Dropdown opens. 2. Selecting filters Kudos list (both Highlight + All Kudos) accordingly, resets pagination to 1. 3. Clearing shows all entries; empty state handled.

Precondition: Departments available, user on Kudos screen
Test_Data: Departments sourced live from DB, e.g. ['Marketing', others]
Steps: 1. Click B.1.2 to open dropdown. 2. Select a department to filter. 3. Clear filter to show all.
Expected_Result: 1. Dropdown opens. 2. Selecting filters Kudos list accordingly. 3. Clearing shows all entries; empty state handled. NOTE: profiles.department currently all default to placeholder 'CEV1' (no real org data yet) — filter will function but list may show only one distinct value today.

Steps: 1. Locate and click a hashtag tag (B.4.3/C.3.7) in the Kudos card.
Expected_Result: 1. Clicking a hashtag updates the Kudos list view to filter only Kudos containing that tag.

Steps: 1. Click Next arrow (B.2.2). 2. Click Prev arrow (B.2.1). 3. Observe state at first/last cards.
Expected_Result: 1. Next moves forward; disabled on last slide. 2. Prev moves back; disabled on first slide. 3. Pagination/arrow states update correctly.

Test_Data: Kudos post card with Like button
Steps: 1. Click Like button. 2. Click again to unlike.
Expected_Result: 1. Clicking Like toggles icon gray→red and increments count. 2. Clicking Unlike returns to gray and decrements count.

Precondition: Kudos card displayed with Copy Link button
Steps: 1. Click C.4.2/Copy Link button.
Expected_Result: 1. Kudos URL copied to clipboard; toast 'Link copied — ready to share!' displayed.

Precondition: Kudos card displayed with View Details button
Steps: 1. Click 'View Details' button on Kudos card.
Expected_Result: 1. System navigates to Kudos detail page.

Precondition: Kudos card with sender info or sidebar leaderboard visible
Steps: 1. Click sender's avatar or name (B.3.2) on Kudos card/leaderboard.
Expected_Result: 1. Sender's profile page opens.

Precondition: Kudos card with receiver info or sidebar leaderboard visible
Steps: 1. Click receiver's avatar or name (B.3.6) on Kudos card/leaderboard.
Expected_Result: 1. Receiver's profile page opens.

Precondition: Spotlight board displayed, pan/zoom icon present
Steps: 1. Click B.7.2/Nút 'Pan/Zoom' icon on Spotlight board.
Expected_Result: 1. Pan/zoom mode toggles between pan and zoom states.

Sub_Sub_Category: Hover shows tooltip, click opens Kudos detail
Steps: 1. Hover over a node in the word cloud. 2. Click the node.
Expected_Result: 1. Tooltip displays name and time received Kudos. 2. Clicking opens the corresponding Kudos detail page.

Precondition: Kudos card contains an image gallery
Test_Data: Kudos post with thumbnail images (max 5 images)
Steps: 1. Click any image thumbnail in the Kudos card gallery.
Expected_Result: 1. Full-size image opens for the selected thumbnail.

Sub_Sub_Category: Click avatar/name to profile, hover preview
Steps: 1. Click avatar or name of a member in sidebar leaderboard. 2. Hover over avatar or name.
Expected_Result: 1. Clicking opens the user's profile page. 2. Hovering displays a preview of the profile.
